message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #000000
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam lifelineColor #000000
skinparam lifelineThickness 1
skinparam activationBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam activationBorderColor #000000
skinparam activationFontColor #000000
skinparam activationPadding 5
skinparam altBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam altBorderColor #000000
skinparam altFontColor #000000
skinparam altPadding 5
skinparam optBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam optBorderColor #000000
skinparam optFontColor #000000
skinparam optPadding 5
skinparam loopBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam loopBorderColor #000000
skinparam loopFontColor #000000
skinparam loopPadding 5
skinparam groupBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam groupBorderColor #000000
skinparam groupFontColor #000000
skinparam groupPadding 5
skinparam refBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam refBorderColor #000000
skinparam refFontColor #000000
skinparam refPadding 5
skinparam dividerBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam dividerBorderColor #000000
skinparam dividerFontColor #000000
skinparam dividerPadding 5
skinparam participant {
    BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 10
}
skinparam note {
    BackgroundColor #FFFFE0
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 10
}
skinparam arrow {
    Color #000000
    Thickness 1
}
skinparam lifeline {
    Color #000000
    Thickness 1
}
skinparam activation {
    BackgroundColor #F0F0F0
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}
skinparam alt {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}
skinparam opt {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}
skinparam loop {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}
skinparam group {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}
skinparam ref {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}
skinparam divider {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor #000000
    FontColor #000000
    Padding 5
}

participant Application
participant Node
participant Composed_VStack
participant VStack
participant State
participant NodeBuilder
participant Control.Layer
participant Renderer

== 布局树构建过程 ==

Application -> Node: build
Node -> Composed_VStack: buildNode
Composed_VStack -> VStack: setupStateProperties
Composed_VStack -> VStack: setupEnvironmentProperties
Composed_VStack -> Node: addNode

alt [LayoutRoot]
    Node -> VStack: loadData
end

== 布局更新构建过程 ==

State -> State: set
State -> Application: invalidateNode
Application -> Application: scheduleUpdate
Application -> Application: update
Application -> Node: update
Node -> NodeBuilder: updateNode
NodeBuilder -> Control.Layer: invalidate
Application -> Renderer: update

@enduml
